pageHead.title: Security Bank's Summer Installment Campaign | Giftaway

props.title: Summer Installment Campaign
props.description:
$$Your first-month installment is on us when you use your Security Bank Credit Card via 0% ChargeLight Installment or Charge Now, Pay Later at your favorite stores! 

Free first-month installment is capped at PHP3,000 to be awarded as cashback 30 days after the promo period.

InvalidReferenceNo.title: Your registration is unsuccessful.
InvalidReferenceNo.description:
$$This may be due to incorrect or mismatched details. Please retry with the correct details or contact Security Bank to update records if needed.

Free first-month installment is capped at PHP3,000 to be awarded as cashback 30 days after the promo period. DTIFTEB250095S26.

AlreadyRegisteredUsername.title: Already Registered
AlreadyRegisteredUsername.description:
$$Thank you for participating in the Summer Installment Cashback Campaign! Your Security Bank Credit Card is already registered.

Keep using your card at your favorite stores with 0% ChargeLight Installment or Charge Now, Pay Later and claim your FREE first-month installment.

Free first-month installment is capped at PHP3,000 to be awarded as cashback 30 days after the promo period. DTIFTEB250095S26.

attrs.class: w-6 h-6 border-2 border-surface-1 border-r-transparent mr-2 rounded-full animate-spin

props.title: Your registration is successful!
props.description:
$$Thank you for joining the Summer Installment Cashback Campaign!

Start using your registered Security Bank credit card and spend at least PHP30,000 in a single-receipt 0% ChargeLight Installment or Charge Now, Pay Later to get a FREE first-month installment until May 31, 2026.

Free first-month installment is capped at PHP3,000 to be awarded as cashback 30 days after the promo period. DTIFTEB250095S26.

props.title: Registration Closed
props.description: The registration period has ended. Thank you for your interest!
